title: 1.1 Reports runtime output showing CLI flags overriding script exported options for a load setting (e.g., scenario summary showing 3 VUs for 1s when the script declares different vus/duration)
1.2 Reports runtime output showing script exported options overriding a conflicting config file load setting (e.g., config file sets vus: 4 but scenario summary shows 1 VU)
1.3 Reports runtime output showing a script-defined scenario is used when no higher-priority execution shortcuts override it (e.g., scenario list includes my_scn and logs show scenarioFn executing)
1.4 Reports runtime output showing CLI execution shortcuts overwrite a script-defined scenario (e.g., scenario list switches to default and logs show defaultFn executing)
1.5 States the consolidation order across sources (e.g., file config, then runner/script options, then env vars, then CLI flags for highest priority)

1.6 Identifies the stage where consolidated options become immutable for the test run (e.g., during TestRunState creation before scheduler starts, in buildTestRunState or equivalent, before VU initialization)

1.7 Explains the execution-setting overwrite behavior across tiers (e.g., higher-tier duration/iterations/stages/scenarios clearing lower-tier execution fields before applying new ones in Options.Apply)
1.9 Reports runtime output from a multi-VU run showing multiple VU identifiers executing within the same run (e.g., console lines with __VU=1 and __VU=3)
